title: rondeletia hotteana
intro: Rondeletia hotteana is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Haitian rondeletia or Haitian wild coffee, native to Haiti. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant's leaves and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as fighting off infections. In herbal preparations, Rondeletia hotteana is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
